nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Streak-breasted treehunter
nodes.summary: Streak-breasted treehunter（Streak-breasted treehunter，学名 Thripadectes rufobrunneus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 貝拉瓜斯省
nodes.summary: 貝拉瓜斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括厚嘴拟啄木鸟、Sulphur-winged parakeet、Ruddy treerunner等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Talamancan montane forests
nodes.summary: Talamancan montane forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Black guan、Buff-fronted quail-dove、Chiriqui quail-dove等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The streak-breasted treehunter is found in the Talamancan montane forests through most of Costa Rica and into Panama as far as Veraguas Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The streak-breasted treehunter is found in the Talamancan montane forests through most of Costa Rica and into Panama as far as Veraguas Province

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in mature secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The streak-breasted treehunter is found in the Talamancan montane forests through most of Costa Rica and into Panama as far as Veraguas Province
